dashboardChanges.title: OpenAI is growing revenue four times faster than Alphabet and Meta at...
dashboardChanges.claim: OpenAI is growing revenue four times faster than Alphabet and Meta at comparable stages.

dashboardChanges.title: Ramp data suggested that Anthropic now captures 73% of all new spending...
dashboardChanges.claim: Ramp data suggested that Anthropic now captures 73% of all new spending among companies buying AI tools; 10 weeks ago it was 50/50 with OpenAI; early December it was 60/40 in OpenAI's favor.

dashboardChanges.title: 10 weeks ago Anthropic and OpenAI were 50/50 in new AI tool spending share...
dashboardChanges.claim: 10 weeks ago Anthropic and OpenAI were 50/50 in new AI tool spending share according to Ramp data.

dashboardChanges.title: Early December, OpenAI had 60% vs Anthropic's 40% of new AI tool spending...
dashboardChanges.claim: Early December, OpenAI had 60% vs Anthropic's 40% of new AI tool spending according to Ramp data.

dashboardChanges.title: OpenAI is still ahead of Anthropic in terms of total spend, but the marginal...
dashboardChanges.claim: OpenAI is still ahead of Anthropic in terms of total spend, but the marginal buyer in the last 6-10 weeks has massively shifted, with 70% going to Anthropic.

dashboardChanges.title: Groq was acquired by Nvidia for $20 billion; Groq had less than $100 million...
dashboardChanges.claim: Groq was acquired by Nvidia for $20 billion; Groq had less than $100 million in ARR at the time of the deal.

dashboardChanges.title: Groq had approximately $100 million in revenue at the time of the $20...
dashboardChanges.claim: Groq had approximately $100 million in revenue at the time of the $20 billion Nvidia deal.

dashboardChanges.title: Groq's last funding round valued the company at $6.9 billion before the $20...
dashboardChanges.claim: Groq's last funding round valued the company at $6.9 billion before the $20 billion Nvidia acquisition.

dashboardChanges.title: Crusoe has over a million GPUs in their fleet and they're valued at over $10...
dashboardChanges.claim: Crusoe has over a million GPUs in their fleet and they're valued at over $10 billion.

dashboardChanges.title: Crusoe has an astonishing total of 45 gigawatts in their pipeline.
dashboardChanges.claim: Crusoe has an astonishing total of 45 gigawatts in their pipeline.

dashboardChanges.title: NVIDIA spent approximately $20 billion acquiring Groq because they lacked a...
dashboardChanges.claim: NVIDIA spent approximately $20 billion acquiring Groq because they lacked a fast inference answer; fast inference requires fast memory access which GPUs don't have.

dashboardChanges.title: Crusoe has over 45 gigawatts in its pipeline of power infrastructure.
dashboardChanges.claim: Crusoe has over 45 gigawatts in its pipeline of power infrastructure.

dashboardChanges.claim: The current generation of Blackwell chips requires 130 kW per rack.

dashboardChanges.claim: The next generation Vera Rubin chips are expected to require 250 kW per rack.

dashboardChanges.claim: The expected CapEx for this year from just the four leading hyperscalers is $600 billion.

dashboardChanges.title: Anthropic hit a $14 billion run rate last month (February), growing revenue...
dashboardChanges.claim: Anthropic hit a $14 billion run rate last month (February), growing revenue from $1 billion to $14 billion in 14 months — roughly 12x year over year.

dashboardChanges.title: Anthropic had a $6 billion month in February 2026, which is more revenue...
dashboardChanges.claim: Anthropic had a $6 billion month in February 2026, which is more revenue than the annual revenue of Databricks and Snowflake combined after 12 years.

dashboardChanges.title: Sarah Friar said that for every gigawatt of data center capacity, it's about...
dashboardChanges.claim: Sarah Friar said that for every gigawatt of data center capacity, it's about $10 billion of annual revenue.

dashboardChanges.title: Anthropic has a $30B run rate, the fastest revenue ramp ever.
dashboardChanges.claim: Anthropic has a $30B run rate, the fastest revenue ramp ever.

dashboardChanges.title: GPU hardware represents approximately 75% of the total cost of ownership of...
dashboardChanges.claim: GPU hardware represents approximately 75% of the total cost of ownership of a data center, and Nvidia takes approximately 75% margin on that.

dashboardChanges.title: GitHub Copilot subscriptions grew from 20 to 26 million in the last quarter.
dashboardChanges.claim: GitHub Copilot subscriptions grew from 20 to 26 million in the last quarter.

dashboardChanges.title: AI coding agents have grown from $500 million run rate at the end of last...
dashboardChanges.claim: AI coding agents have grown from $500 million run rate at the end of last year (just GitHub Copilot) to a current run rate of $5–6 billion across GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, Cognition, Windsurf, Replit, and OpenAI Codex — a 10x increase.

dashboardChanges.title: AI coding agent market grew approximately 10x from ~$500M run rate (end of...
dashboardChanges.claim: AI coding agent market grew approximately 10x from ~$500M run rate (end of last year) to $5–6B run rate now.
